page.title: Me
page.unauthDescription: Configure your preferences and system settings.
page.unauthSignInHint: Please sign in using the button in the header to get started.

integrations.title: Legacy integrations
integrations.subtitle: Basic credentials for older apps that connect over webhook, WebDAV, or S3.
integrations.empty: No legacy integrations are set up yet.
integrations.credentialsHint: Generate these only when a legacy client needs a token, username, or access key.
integrations.confirmRevoke: Revoke credential "{{name}}"? Any apps using it will stop working immediately.

errors.alreadyConfigured: This protocol is already set up.

create.title: Set up legacy access
create.description: Create one full-access credential for an older app or client. The secret is shown once.
create.scopeHint: Folder under your data root. The credential will only see this subtree.
create.fullAccessHint: Legacy credentials can read and write your data root.
create.surfaceDisabled: This protocol is currently disabled. The credential will mint, but requests to its URL will 404 until you enable the toggle above.

reveal.title: Save your credentials
reveal.description: These values are shown once. Copy them into your app now — you cannot retrieve them later.
reveal.webhookHint: Replace `{filename}` with the destination path under your scope folder.
reveal.webdavHint: Mount this URL with your username and password in any WebDAV client (Finder, Files, Cyberduck, Obsidian Remotely Save).
reveal.s3Hint: Configure your S3 client (rclone, restic, Duplicati) with this endpoint, bucket, access key id, and secret. Use path-style addressing and any region (the server ignores it).

logLevel.label: Log Level
logLevel.hint: A browser refresh or server restart may be required to apply.

uiLanguage.label: Display language
uiLanguage.hint: The language used for MyLifeDB's interface. Empty follows your browser/system.

surfaces.title: Integration surfaces
surfaces.subtitle: Enable the protocols apps can use to push data into MyLifeDB.
surfaces.liveHint: Toggling a surface takes effect immediately.
